--- 

image: Raj.png 
description: Adjunct Research Fellow 
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 10em 
  image-shape: round 
  links: 
  - icon: github 
    text: GitHub 
    href: https://github.com/abhirscecocommons 
  - icon: orcid 
    text: ORCID 
    href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2279-7060 
  - text: Google scholar 
    href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MVQy2wkAAAAJ&hl=en 
  - icon: person-vcard 
    text: Staff page 
    href: https://www.qcif.edu.au/our-people/abhimanyu-(raj)-singh 
title: Abhimanyu (Raj) Singh 
--- 

Abhimanyu Raj Singh is a Data Scientist and Ecologist working with Ecosystem Indicators Workflows (EIW) project initiative led by UNSW Sydney and EcoCommons project hosted by QCIF Digital Research. He facilitates delivery of FAIR workflow packages, training materials, and community engagement activities. His work bridges ecological science and data infrastructure, supporting researchers and practitioners to develop reproducible, scalable ecosystem-specific indicators across Australia. He contributes to a national effort to empower diverse user communities, from ecologists to policy analysts through guided, well-documented workflows aligned with the IUCN Red List of Ecosystems and Global Ecosystem Typology. Abhimanyu is committed to open science and building technical capacity across government, academic, and industry sectors engaged in ecosystem monitoring and reporting.
